publishDecision.summary: OpenAI to sell AI to US agencies through Amazon cloud unit looks like the stronger lead today.
leadStrengths: The story is still fresh enough for a morning-led publish.

product update stories are easier to explain clearly than broad industry-shift headlines.
leadRisks: The Guardian is not on the trusted-source list, so the lead needs stronger verification.
backupStrengths: Reuters is treated as a trusted source for the morning stack.
